category_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/sebastinas/yafc says Yafc is an FTP client.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading uses YAFC.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for YAFC.
repo_sources: Official repository page describes sebastinas/yafc as Yafc, another FTP client.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL: https://github.com/sebastinas/yafc.
tags_sources: Official repository README lists FTP/SFTP client features including tab completion, multiple connections, reconnects, and recursive transfers.
source_facts.description identifies YAFC as a command-line FTP client.
